name: pet-motion
attribution: Subhashish Panigrahi — Wikimedia Commons, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Puppy_playing.webm , CC BY-SA 3.0.
expected: Non-rigid moving subject (a puppy moving across a room) animates; the handheld camera motion is absorbed into the per-frame CameraTrack so the background stays put under orbit.
